items.bambu: New, Open, Save, Save As, Close
items.ours: Yeni proje, proje aç, kaydet, farklı kaydet ve dirty state
items.acceptance: Project round-trip preserves geometry, transforms and process settings.

items.ours: IndexedDB autosave, recovery candidate and atomic server writes
items.acceptance: A dirty session is offered after reload without overwriting the main project.

items.ours: Project hub and de-duplicated recent project list
items.acceptance: Recent paths stay ordered, unique and open from disk.

items.ours: One active project session
items.acceptance: Each project tab isolates dirty, undo, autosave, selection and jobs.

items.bambu: Rich project info, images, BOM and attachments
items.ours: Project identity, path, counts and save/recovery timestamps
items.acceptance: Project package validates optional images, BOM and attachment manifest.

items.ours: Pattern and DXF multi-select, group move and common alignment
items.acceptance: Ctrl selection moves and aligns every selected object without moving unselected geometry.

items.ours: Ctrl+C/X/V for patterns, contours and one or more DXF placements
items.acceptance: Pasted DXF placements receive new instance IDs and retain child patterns.

items.ours: Placement-child pattern attachment and semantic vector objects
items.acceptance: Nested document groups support group/ungroup and save-open round-trip.

items.bambu: Object tree, z-order, enable, hide and lock
items.ours: Part/pattern lists, process ignore and contour locks
items.acceptance: A unified tree controls rename, z-order, visibility, lock and export behavior.

items.ours: Left, center, right, top, middle, bottom and equal distribution
items.acceptance: Alignment deltas preserve object dimensions and equal distribution preserves outer extent.

items.ours: Mirror-copy against DXF center axes
items.acceptance: Mirrored copies preserve the source and remain aligned to the chosen axis.

items.bambu: Union, subtract, intersect, difference and merge
items.ours: Topology-specific region and contour repair tools
items.acceptance: All five Boolean operations produce valid closed polygons with undo and preview.

items.bambu: Offset, path edit, simplify and tab
items.ours: Contour smoothing, repair, cut regions and manual bridge editing
items.acceptance: Offset exposes join/end style and live preview; simplify reports point delta.

items.ours: Copy/paste and automatic layout
items.acceptance: Grid and circular arrays support count, spacing, pivot and source-linked editing.

items.ours: Measured rectangle, circle, polygon and loaded/single-line fonts
items.acceptance: Generated geometry remains 1:1 mm and supports process assignment.

items.bambu: Pen, pencil, three-point arc and center-point arc
items.ours: Vector/freehand drawing with smoothing and close-path
items.acceptance: Dedicated pen, pencil and both arc constraints survive save-open and undo.

items.ours: No production-safe generator yet
items.acceptance: Codes pass scanner validation at physical size; shear uses numeric pivot and undo.

items.ours: Dynamic mm grid, origin, bed, margin, center axes and material polygon
items.acceptance: Reference layers are independently visible and never affect G-code or nesting bounds.

items.bambu: Brightness, contrast, gamma, sharpness and filters
items.ours: Non-destructive brightness, contrast, sharpness, negative and presets
items.acceptance: Edits remain reversible and the rendered raster is the one used for G-code.

items.ours: Crop, paint mask and background/vector cleanup controls
items.acceptance: Crop coordinates are orientation-safe and mask edits support undo.

items.ours: OpenCV, Potrace and VTracer line-art pipeline
items.acceptance: White background is ignored and clean mask paths preserve line-art topology.

items.ours: Single monochrome operation output
items.acceptance: Color layers have independent vectors, operation settings and ordering.

items.bambu: Print Then Cut and sticker frame options
items.ours: Raster/vector clipping to DXF boundary
items.acceptance: Registration marks, frame, holes and cut-through pass a printed alignment test.

items.bambu: Basic Cut, Drawing Line, Drawing Fill and raster
items.ours: Cut, line engraving, fill engraving, raster and ignore
items.acceptance: Operation markers and per-object S/F values survive G-code analysis.

items.ours: Inner-first plus engraving-before-outer-cut toolpath order
items.acceptance: A visible operation graph allows safe reorder and detects dependency conflicts.

items.bambu: Material catalog by device, watt, thickness and process
items.ours: Built-in and custom cut/engrave profiles
items.acceptance: Profile identity includes material, thickness, laser watt, process and calibration source.

items.ours: One bed and one active profile
items.acceptance: Objects can be assigned to independent batches and output groups.

items.ours: 2-10 by 2-10 cut/line matrix with independent S/F and labels
items.acceptance: Every generated cell carries its own bounded power and feed value.

items.bambu: Separate Prepare stage with keep-layout or auto-arrange
items.ours: Design/Prepare workflow with persistent entry strategy
items.acceptance: Prepare preserves manual positions or recalculates only when configured.

items.bambu: Shape-aware auto arrange on work area or captured stock
items.ours: Deterministic multi-strategy rectangular packing and editable stock polygon
items.acceptance: Polygon/NFP nesting reports material utilization and never overlaps active contours.

items.ours: Single bed with explicit out-of-bed parking
items.acceptance: Overflow creates independent named plates with stable object ownership.

items.ours: Design-level mirror copy
items.acceptance: A plate mirror flag changes toolpaths without changing source geometry.

items.bambu: Capture Image and Fine Contour Extraction
items.ours: Capability disabled on the current GRBL profile
items.acceptance: Capture requires calibrated camera homography and explicit user confirmation.

items.ours: Capability disabled without a calibrated camera
items.acceptance: Detected poses remain editable and never enter G-code before confirmation.

items.bambu: Processing/travel layers, timeline, scrub and playback speed
items.ours: Cut/engrave/travel filters, scrub, play/pause and 0.1x-10x speed
items.acceptance: Timeline position, elapsed time and visible segments match analyzed G-code.

items.bambu: Duration, distance, current position and Make
items.ours: Process/travel distance, estimate, X/Y and hash-linked safe production actions
items.acceptance: External G-code is hash identified and unsafe/incomplete modal state blocks sending.

items.bambu: Connect, upload, start, pause and telemetry
items.ours: GRBL serial connect, jog, home, hold, resume, reset, frame, origin and stream
items.acceptance: Alarm, E-stop and disconnect end with laser off and traceable history.

items.ours: Local serial-port discovery
items.acceptance: Network adapters store credentials in the OS vault and work without cloud.

items.bambu: Rotary, curved surface, blade and pen
items.ours: Capabilities explicitly disabled for the current GRBL profile
items.acceptance: Unsupported tools are absent from post-processing and cannot leak commands.

items.bambu: General, Project, Canvas and Processing preferences
items.ours: Theme, simple/expert density, autosave, recents, grid, Prepare and Preview defaults
items.acceptance: Preferences persist across reload and application/project scopes remain separate.

items.bambu: Shortcuts, config, update, report, privacy and licenses
items.ours: Shortcut reference, capability report and privacy-safe diagnostics export
items.acceptance: Diagnostics contain no project geometry, project paths or G-code content.

items.bambu: Persistent HMS-like alerts and job history
items.ours: Persistent notifications and hash-linked generated/sent/job status history
items.acceptance: Warnings, alarms and completion records survive reload and de-duplicate safely.
